SEEC Media Group Limited ( (HK:0205) ) has shared an announcement.

SEEC Media Group Limited, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and continued in Bermuda, issued a clarification announcement regarding a clerical error in their English-language documents for an upcoming meeting. The error involved incorrect terminology, where ‘Extraordinary General Meeting’ was mistakenly used instead of ‘Special General Meeting’. The company confirmed that the Chinese versions were correct and that all other information remains unchanged.

Leader Education Limited ( (HK:1449) ) has issued an announcement.

Leader Education Limited, through its subsidiary Heilongjiang College of Business and Technology, has entered into a major finance lease arrangement with Haitong Unitrust. This transaction, which involves a sale price of RMB70,000,000, is significant as it exceeds 25% of the company’s applicable ratio, necessitating compliance with specific reporting and approval requirements under Hong Kong’s Listing Rules. The arrangement has been approved by a closely allied group of shareholders, representing approximately 74.50% of the company’s total issued shares, thus eliminating the need for a general shareholders’ meeting.

data.title: Hanhua Financial Clarifies Director Election Process
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3903) ) has issued an announcement.

Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. has issued a clarification announcement regarding the election of directors through a cumulative voting system. The company has proposed two resolutions, Resolution 4 and Resolution 6, concerning the method of electing directors. Resolution 4 focuses on electing non-independent directors, while Resolution 6 proposes the election of all directors, both independent and non-independent, through the cumulative voting system. If both resolutions are approved, the company will convene further meetings to resolve the matter until only one resolution is passed, ensuring compliance with applicable laws and the Articles of Association.

More about Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. Class H

Hanhua Financial Holding Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited liability company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. The company operates within the financial services industry, focusing on providing a range of financial solutions and services.
